case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS HALL, EVYONNE RENE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,438.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, EVYONNE RENE HALL, FRANK JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, FRANK JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, EVYONNE RENE HALL, FRANK JR. $990.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,011.00, SITPULATED JUDGMENT. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT HALL, FRANK JR. PER PLFT'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, EVYONNE RENE
